Hero.subtitle: SRYNIC is a digital engineering studio that transforms complex challenges into smart software, digital platforms, and intelligent solutions.

About.title: A studio of engineers, designers, and builders.
About.p1: We partner with ambitious teams to design and ship digital products end-to-end — from discovery and architecture to launch and scale. Our work spans fintech, edtech, logistics, and IoT, with a single thread: technology that empowers people.
About.p2: Founded in Jakarta, SRYNIC operates with a remote-first culture and a relentless focus on craft. We don't just deliver code — we deliver outcomes.

Services.title: Systems for every platform.
Services.subtitle: From native desktop apps to AI-powered platforms, we engineer software across the surfaces your users live on.
Services.desktopBody: Native and cross-platform desktop applications for Windows, macOS, and Linux — built for performance and offline-first workflows.
Services.mobileBody: iOS and Android apps with native feel and modern UX — from MVPs to mission-critical apps used by thousands daily.
Services.webBody: Responsive web apps, dashboards, and marketing sites engineered for speed, SEO, and scale — Next.js, React, and modern stacks.
Services.aiBody: Embed LLMs, vector search, and intelligent automation into your product — from copilots and chatbots to custom AI workflows.

Goals.title: Why we build.
Goals.subtitle: Three principles guide every engagement we take on.
Goals.g1Body: Software should make complex work simple. We design for the humans on the other side of the screen — operators, customers, and teams.
Goals.g2Body: We favor boring, durable technology choices and clean architecture. Our products are built to be maintained, not just shipped.
Goals.g3Body: We invest in emerging tools — AI, IoT, real-time systems — so our partners can leapfrog, not catch up.

CTA.title: Have an idea? Let's build it together.
CTA.subtitle: Tell us about your project and we'll reply within 1 business day.

Projects.title: Selected work.
Projects.subtitle: A glimpse of the platforms, products, and systems we've shipped with partners across industries.
Projects.ctaSubtitle: We take on a handful of new engagements each quarter.

Contact.title: Let's build something together.
Contact.subtitle: Tell us a little about your project, your goals, and your timeline. We'll get back to you within one business day.
Contact.fieldTypePh: e.g. Web platform, mobile app, AI integration
Contact.fieldMessagePh: Tell us about your project, timeline, and goals.
Contact.successBody: Your message is ready in WhatsApp. Hit send there to finish.

Footer.tagline: Building digital products that put the future in your hands.
